name: Functional - Successful Agent Run with Complete Input
description: Validates that RFQAgent.run processes a complete input payload and returns a successful response with all required fields.
input: A dict with valid pipeline_run_id, rfq_json containing contact_email, line_items with bu_category, and email_subject.
output: A dict with success=True, agent_run_id, crm_quote_number, output_blob_path, and final_json.
